checks.outline_card_content: empty - single card numbered '1' with no title or content

ui_result.console_error: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] error generating outline: Unable to complete request

generation_endpoint.note: Etap intercepted this SSE endpoint and returned block response

render_generation_endpoint.note: Called after generation, received 201 Created but outline was empty

diagnosis.description: Build #12 strategy (event:generation + warning title + done/error flags) failed. The generation endpoint was intercepted and returned status 200, but the Gamma frontend received 'Unable to complete request' error. The outline card appeared with just number '1' and no title/content. Warning text was not placed in the outline title as intended.
possible_causes: SSE event:generation format mismatch - Gamma may expect specific SSE event names or JSON structure
The generation SSE stream was closed too quickly before Gamma could parse outline data
done:true + error:true flags may cause Gamma to abort outline parsing before reading warning title
Gamma frontend treats the response as a failure rather than displaying the block response content

comparison_with_previous_builds.build_12: event:generation type restored from build_10, but warning title approach not rendering

action_needed: Check exact SSE event format sent by Etap for generation endpoint
Verify that Gamma expects 'event: generation' or a different event name
Test without error:true flag to see if outline parses warning title
Consider delivering warning in the SSE data payload instead of outline title field

verdict: NOT_DONE - Warning not rendering in Build #12. Outline empty with 'Unable to complete request' error.
